problem id: 1bf84ce3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  01001001 -> 00010000
  00011110 -> 10000001
  10010001 -> 00000000
  11001111 -> 11110000
  00101111 -> 11000010
  00100011 -> 00000000
  00110000 -> 00000000
  10110101 -> 01001001
  01110000 -> 00000100

query: 10011001
predicted answer: 00000000
